description: Summary must be generated using everything learned during the call — not just the pre-fetched plan. Flow: (1) call ends (Vapi webhook fires call-ended event); (2) conversation_agent compiles final summary from full call context: original calendar events + weather/commute data + user corrections made during call + ad-hoc events mentioned (DOPS-20) + any calendar events added (DOPS-8); (3) summary generated via LLM using full conversation transcript + AgentState; (4) summary sent to user via preferred channel (DOPS-7). Key constraint: summary is sent AFTER call ends, not during. Do not send mid-call. Implementation: vapi_webhooks.py handles 'call-ended' event and triggers summary generation + send; conversation_agent.generate_post_call_summary(state) compiles and formats; ensure call transcript is available in AgentState before summary is generated. Touches: api/vapi_webhooks.py, agents/conversation_agent.py, agents/state.py. Acceptance: Summary sent only after Vapi fires call-ended; includes all info from the call (not just pre-call plan); ad-hoc events and user corrections reflected; delivery confirmed via debug_logs; not sent if call fails before completion.
title: Generate summary from full call context and send after call ends
